englishFields.Önergenin Başlığı ve Özeti: Motion to open a parliamentary investigation in order to identify the problems faced by apple producers and determine the measures to be taken.

englishFields.Önergenin Başlığı ve Özeti: Motion to open a parliamentary investigation in order to determine the possible negative effects of the restrictive measures taken regarding the press sector in the Public Sector Savings and Efficiency Package on the local press and to determine what needs to be done to support local press organizations.

englishFields.Önergenin Başlığı ve Özeti: Motion to open a parliamentary investigation in order to investigate the appointment problems experienced in the Central Physician Appointment System and access to health services and to determine the measures that need to be taken.
